steps.title: Translate the relationship
steps.content:
The phrase "$y$ is $84$ less than $x$" means take $x$ and subtract $84$:
$$y = x - 84$$

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $y = x + 84$ — this adds $84$, meaning $y$ would be $84$ more than $x$, not less. Eliminate.
  • Choice B: $y = \frac{1}{84}x$ — this divides $x$ by $84$, a multiplicative relationship, not a subtraction. Eliminate.
  • Choice C: $y = 84x$ — this multiplies $x$ by $84$, not subtracts. Eliminate.
  • Choice D: $y = x - 84$ — subtracts $84$ from $x$, matching "$84$ less than $x$".
That matches choice D — D is correct.
